title: Pythagorean Theorem Calculator - Find Side Lengths
description: Free Pythagorean theorem calculator. Find the missing side of a right triangle using a² + b² = c². Calculate hypotenuse or leg length.
keywords: pythagorean theorem calculator, right triangle calculator, hypotenuse calculator, a2+b2=c2
intro: Find the missing side of a right triangle. Enter any two sides to calculate the third using a² + b² = c².

faq.a: In a right triangle, the square of the hypotenuse (c) equals the sum of squares of the other two sides: a² + b² = c².
c = √(a² + b²). Enter the two legs (a and b) and calculate the square root of their squares' sum.
